assertions.evidence: Section '4. What TASKS.md should look like' explicitly recommends creating TASKS.md at '/home/user/projects/personal/personas/plugins/warren/TASKS.md' as a dedicated file for action items, separate from MEMORY.md. The summary table also lists TASKS.md as a new file.

The dashboard's loadContent() fetch logic and renderWeeklyReview() function show exactly how the skill output connects to the dashboard.
